title: Ancient Elements
description: Find the Earth, Wind, Water and Fire paintings through the Archaeology system!
body:
This is a very simple datapack that integrates all four elemental paintings into the `minecraft:archaeology/trail_ruins_rare` loot table. Additionally, you can unearth some more specific pantings in the following archaeologic sites:

## Desert Pyramid
- Earth
- Fire
## Desert Well
- Earth
- Water
# Cold Ocean Ruin
- Water
- Wind
# Warm Ocean Ruin
- Water
- Earth
